search.placeholder: Search for an address in Switzerland…

sidebar.title: Settlement quality
sidebar.overviewHint: Weighted average of {{count}} GeoZarr indicators (0–100, higher = better).
sidebar.layersHint: Active factors with weight > 0 form the weighted map and the overall score.

populationDensity.label: Population density
populationDensity.description: FSO STATPOP, inhabitants per km² (100 m grid)

ptAccessibility.label: PT accessibility
ptAccessibility.description: ARE public transport accessibility score (EW, higher = better connected)

mivAccessibility.label: Road accessibility
mivAccessibility.description: ARE road accessibility score (EW, higher = better connected)

ptQuality.label: PT quality
ptQuality.description: ARE public transport quality classes (A=4 … D=1, higher = better)

ptTravelTime.label: PT travel time
ptTravelTime.description: ARE travel time to the 6 major centres by public transport (minutes)

mivTravelTime.label: Road travel time
mivTravelTime.description: ARE travel time to the 6 major centres by road (minutes)

railTraffic.label: Rail traffic
railTraffic.description: ARE rail passenger traffic (AADT, lower = quieter)

roadTraffic.label: Road traffic
roadTraffic.description: ARE road traffic load (AADT vehicles, lower = better)

secondaryHomes.label: Secondary residences
secondaryHomes.description: ARE housing inventory, share of secondary residences (%, lower = better)

landscapeType.label: Landscape type
landscapeType.description: ARE landscape typology (type no., higher = more diverse category)

solarPotential.label: Solar potential
solarPotential.description: ARE solar installation suitability aspects (1–5, higher = more favourable)

agglomeration.label: Agglomeration
agglomeration.description: ARE agglomeration programme (eligible area for subsidies)
